summary: Verified the sidebar brand-logo fix: after quick-login as CTO, the sidebar now renders an pointing to the same lsy7cvxh_images.jpeg emblem used on the login page. Image loads successfully (naturalWidth=225, rendered 36x36) with fuchsia drop-shadow, matching the login page emblem exactly. No regressions on login page emblem.
critical_code_review_comments: Login page emblem in Login.jsx (EtharaMask) currently has no data-testid; consider adding data-testid='login-logo' for symmetric testability with sidebar-logo.
Non-blocking: Recharts warnings 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' appear on dashboard load — investigate ResponsiveContainer parent sizing (unrelated to this bug).
test_credentials: Quick-login CTO card on /login (mocked, no backend)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified sidebar-logo == login emblem (URL: https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_budget-forge-8/artifacts/lsy7cvxh_images.jpeg). Sidebar.jsx lines 107-112 confirmed. Only CTO role was tested but the sidebar brand block is role-agnostic so CFO/TPM will render the same emblem.
rca of the issue: Original bug: Sidebar.jsx contained a generic inline SVG placeholder inside a gradient tile instead of the emblem image. Fix (already applied by main agent): replaced the SVG with . Verified via DOM inspection + naturalWidth check post-login.
